query:
SELECT 
  'Total Users' as metric,
  COUNT(*) as value,
  NULL as detail
FROM users

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  'Paid Subscriptions',
  COUNT(*),
  NULL
FROM users
WHERE stripe_subscription_id IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT
  'Total Stripe Payments',
  COUNT(*),
  NULL
FROM stripe_payments

UNION ALL

SELECT
  'Total Revenue (USD)',
  COALESCE(SUM(amount_total) / 100, 0),
  NULL
FROM stripe_payments
WHERE status = 'paid' OR payment_status = 'paid'

UNION ALL

SELECT
  'Total Music Video Jobs',
  COUNT(*),
  NULL
FROM music_video_jobs

UNION ALL

SELECT
  'Completed Jobs',
  COUNT(*),
  NULL
FROM music_video_jobs
WHERE status = 'completed'

UNION ALL

SELECT
  'Failed Jobs',
  COUNT(*),
  NULL
FROM music_video_jobs
WHERE status = 'failed';
